data.raceComments: {"comment":"11. TEN CARAT LUCY has gone close in both of her runs this prep, narrowly beaten each time, and she now drops in grade. She can settle a touch closer to the pace this time from a superior gate, and with Ryan Wiggins back in the saddle, being a strong lead, she can go one better. 1. BETTER THAN WORDS resumed with a strong on-pace second at this track and trip 4 weeks ago, and she gets the blinkers back on. She will find this company more to her liking, and she should go close to taking it out. 9. LITTLE PINKER copped a wide run at Mackay last time out but still stuck on bravely as the favourite to finish a game fourth. His dominant Thangool win before that is the guide to use, and if she can find some early cover this time, then she can bounce straight back into the money. 6. BOLD CHANGE was heavily backed when winning an overdue Maiden easily at Mackay over 1300m. He carries the same weight after a 2kg claim, and he has the scope to take the next step immediately.","runners":[11,1,9,6],"exclusive":true}
